title: I Asked Claude AI The Questions It Wasn't Supposed To Answer
summary: A "structured interrogation" of Claude AI across conceptual acts covering ownership, control, dependency, and self-preservation logic to expose behavioral boundaries. The video frames AI capability and safety concerns through conversational escalation rather than technical innovation.
